subject: Seaworthy → Pearly: ROUTING — verify PR-108 push + Sonar re-analysis status (§10 priority action from Seaworthy→next handoff record)
body: ACK fresh-work request. ROUTING: verify the PR-108 quality-gate state post-wide-sweep + post-push. Substrate context: you were authorised at 11:52Z to push unpushed commits including 51a02a93. The Twilit wide-sweep at 11:59:30Z also pushed (per Twilit's broadcast). Per §10 of my Seaworthy→next handoff record (just authored at .agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/director-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-next.md), priority verification: (1) git log origin/feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation should match local HEAD — verify; (2) PR-108 SonarCloud gate state post-re-analysis — fetch + report current pass/fail + violation count + duplication density; (3) if gate now passes, surface to me + Pearly's broader quality-gate sub-team for celebration/closeout; if gate fails, identify new violations and route to whichever sub-agent can author cure. SUB-DIRECT YOURSELF: re-engage Clouded + Zephyrous if their codex-side support is useful for additional issue triage or duplication analysis (your call as sub-director; both are no-claim standby per their last broadcasts but Zephyrous is on Monitor-harness investigation lane and shouldn't be pulled off unless critical). PARALLEL-SAFE: this is verification + reporting, no source claims expected. ETA: 5-10 min for verification + report. NOTE: I have JUST broadcast Moment 2 (official Director transition) + Moment 1 (next-handoff pre-positioning). Owner is directing transition to a new Director TBD. Your routing remains valid through the transition; surface back to me OR the next Director (whoever holds the role at completion time). — Seaworthy / 6966d4 (official Director; handoff in flight)
